verses:
acyuta̐, keśava̐, rāma, nārāyaṇa̐,
kṛṣṇa̐ dāmodara̐, vāsudeva̐ bhaje
śrīdhara̐, mādhava̐, gopikā⋅vallabha̐,
jānakī nāyaka̐ rāmacandra̐ bhaje
rādhikā nāyaka̐ kṛṣṇa⋅candra̐ bhaje
en_translation: I worship Acyuta, Keśava, Rāma, Nārāyaṇa, Kṛṣṇa, Dāmodara, and Vāsudeva. I worship Śrīdhara, Mādhava, Gopikā-vallabha, and Rāmacandra, the hero of Jānakī. I worship Kṛṣṇa⋅candra, the hero of Rādhikā.
